description: LinkedIn algorithmic positioning engine — 2026 organic growth standards

profile_completeness_score.headline_keywords: critical — first 120 chars indexed for search

headline_formulas.example: Helping Saudi Fintechs Scale 3x via AI-Driven Automation | Growth Architect
300% Lead Growth for B2B SaaS — Full-Stack Engineer | System Architecture
Principal Engineer | React+Node+AI | Middle East Enterprise

about_section_structure.hook: Problem → Agitation → Solution (PAS) formula, max 2 lines
about_section_structure.credibility: Specific metrics: 'Delivered 14 enterprise systems totaling 2.8M SAR in value'
about_section_structure.differentiation: What makes you the ONLY choice for this niche
about_section_structure.cta: Clear next step: 'DM me 'AUDIT' for a free profile review'

cold_dm_template.opener: Hi [Name], noticed your work on [Specific Project/Post]. I specialize in [Value Proposition] for [Industry].
cold_dm_template.value_proof: Recently helped [Similar Client] achieve [Specific Result]. Here's how: [1-line case study].
cold_dm_template.offer: Would you be open to a 15-min call on [Specific Topic] this week?
cold_dm_template.cta: No pitch — just value. What does your Thursday look like?

comment_to_dm_sequence.day_1: Add valuable insight to their post (not just 'great post!')
comment_to_dm_sequence.day_5: Send DM referencing your previous interaction

content_to_lead_magnet.step_1: Post value-driven content for 5-7 days straight
content_to_lead_magnet.step_2: Analyze which topic got highest engagement
content_to_lead_magnet.step_3: DM everyone who engaged: 'You liked my post on [Topic] — I created a detailed framework. Want it?'

do: Post native video (minimum 3 min watch time target)
Reply to every comment within 60 min of posting
Cross-reference thought leaders in your posts
Post Sun-Wed for max algorithmic boost
